name: coherence-mcp-server
description: MCP server for the Coherence Network — 20 typed tools for AI agents to browse ideas, trace value chains, link identities, and record contributions.

tools.name: list_ideas
tools.description: Browse the idea portfolio ranked by ROI and free-energy score

tools.name: get_idea
tools.description: Get full details for a single idea including scores and open questions

tools.name: idea_progress
tools.description: Get progress for an idea: stage, tasks, CC staked/spent, contributors

tools.name: select_idea
tools.description: Let the portfolio engine select the next highest-ROI idea to work on

tools.name: showcase
tools.description: List validated, shipped ideas that have proven their value

tools.name: resonance
tools.description: Show which ideas are generating the most energy and activity right now

tools.name: list_specs
tools.description: List feature specs with ROI metrics, value gaps, and implementation summaries

tools.name: get_spec
tools.description: Get full spec detail including implementation summary, pseudocode, and ROI

tools.name: list_lineage
tools.description: List value lineage chains connecting ideas to specs and implementations

tools.name: lineage_valuation
tools.description: Get ROI valuation for a lineage chain

tools.name: list_providers
tools.description: List all supported identity providers grouped by category

tools.name: link_identity
tools.description: Link a provider identity to a contributor

tools.name: lookup_identity
tools.description: Find which contributor owns a specific provider identity

tools.name: get_identities
tools.description: Get all linked identities for a contributor

tools.name: record_contribution
tools.description: Record a contribution to the network

tools.name: contributor_ledger
tools.description: Get the contribution ledger for a contributor

tools.name: status
tools.description: Get Coherence Network system status

tools.name: friction_report
tools.description: Get the friction report showing where contributors are getting stuck

tools.name: list_change_requests
tools.description: List open change requests / governance proposals

tools.name: list_federation_nodes
tools.description: List federation compute nodes
